svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Context" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-704" dy="-195" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Pede Aqui — System Context (C4 L1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="600" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sys" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Pede Aqui Platform

Multi-tenant delivery marketplace
(Spring Boot API + web/mobile clients)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="280" x="560" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="customer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Customer
(web + mobile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="120" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vendor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Vendor Admin
(backoffice)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="120" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="courier" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Courier / Estafeta
(mobile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="120" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="platform" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Platform Admin / OPS
Finance / Support" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="120" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="keycloak" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="Keycloak
(Identity Provider / JWT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1080" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;" value="AWS S3 / MinIO
(object storage, presigned URLs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1080" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payment" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;" value="Payment Provider
(M-Pesa / mock gateway)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1080" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="customer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sys" value="Browse, order, track"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="vendor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sys" value="Manage catalog / orders"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="courier" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sys" value="Accept, pickup, deliver (OTP)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="platform" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sys" value="Tenants, finance, tickets"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="sys" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="keycloak" value="Validate JWT / OIDC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="sys" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="storage" value="Presigned upload/download"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="sys" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="payment" value="Charge / confirm payment"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
